_meta.title: Feed/agent-activity family BUILD (icons PREP -> M1 component fan-out -> serial integration -> site/catalog waves -> M2 exemplar wave) — the execution plan the feed-family SPEC/LLD are authored against
_meta.author: planner (design seat)
_meta.grounding: PRD feed-family.prd.md (PRD-G1..G4) · ADR-0112 (ACCEPTED 2026-07-09; clauses 1-8 + forks F1-F4 as recommended) · ADR-0114 (ACCEPTED — the href-gate contract attachment's link leg reuses by reference) · the intake decomp feed-family-intake.decomp.json (M0 records only — this manifest adds the build plane) · fleet gates verified against the tree: file-set.test.ts (folder triple; radio/radio-group same-folder second-file-set precedent), family-coherence.test.ts, descriptor/site-coverage.test.ts (PAGES_BY_TIER: display/indicator/layout -> doc; pattern -> doc+demo; display-tier membership list), catalog/default/index.test.ts (fleet-derived gate + EXCLUSION_ALLOWLIST at line 145 + allowlistResidue guard), a2ui/tools/agent/feed-catalog.ts (ADR-0097 partition rows)
_meta.note: Both planes derived independently. OUTSIDE-IN from the wave/slice structure the fleet build discipline imposes (a serial PREP slice for the icons prerequisite ahead of the fan-out; one writer per control folder; every shared/barrel edit deferred to ONE serial integration slice; site, catalog, exemplar waves after). INSIDE-OUT from what the family must DO, enumerated from ADR-0112's eight clauses + standing laws (ADR-0102 CSS-less consumer, ADR-0057 non-color signifier, ADR-0082 no-global-singleton, WCAG 2.2.1 timing-adjustable, geometry.md Display/Indicator classes, test-the-whole-shape) — not read off the node tree.

nodes.label: PREP: @agent-ui/icons vendor addition (person + 8 file-category glyphs; ICON_NAMES 11 -> 20; ADR-0066 mechanics)
nodes.accept: icons/src/types.ts ICON_NAMES gains user + file/file-image/file-audio/file-video/file-pdf/file-text/file-zip/file-code; the phosphor pack ships a verified inner-SVG payload per new name (no data-icon-missing render for any); icons registry/types tests green (`npm test` on the icons package files)

nodes.label: M1 component fan-out (one writer per folder)
ui-progress control folder (controls/progress/: progress.ts/.css/.md + jsdom & browser tests)
nodes.accept: file-set gate passes for controls/progress/; a11y probe asserts internals.role=progressbar with ariaValueNow/Min/Max+ariaValueText when determinate and ariaValueNow ABSENT when indeterminate (never aria-hidden); hardening unit rows (null/non-finite/negative/over-max value, invalid max) each render the stated state without throwing; browser legs (Chromium+WebKit): whole-shape (bare <ui-progress> in a flex row paints >= the token floor, never a sliver), forced-colors (fill CanvasText, track distinguishable), prefers-reduced-motion (no translation animation on the indeterminate mark)

nodes.label: ui-avatar control folder (controls/avatar/: avatar-initials.ts pure module + avatar.ts/.css/.md + tests)
nodes.accept: file-set gate passes for controls/avatar/; initials unit tests cover multi-word/single-word/empty/grapheme-cluster names against the frozen initialsFrom signature; fallback-chain tests: src load error falls to initials, empty name falls to the person glyph, src set after fallback re-attempts the image — never a broken-image or empty box; a11y probe: decorative by default (internals.ariaHidden), label opts into role=img + name; browser legs: circle mask paints at the compact-ramp box under [size] sm/md/lg, WHCM ring visible

nodes.label: ui-attachment control folder (controls/attachment/: attachment-meta.ts pure module + attachment.ts/.css/.md + tests) — metadata surface, NO href leg
nodes.accept: file-set gate passes for controls/attachment/; attachment-meta unit tests pin fileCategory (mime -> 8 categories incl. parameter-stripping + case-insensitivity), categoryLabel fallback titles, and formatBytes rows (null/non-finite/negative -> absent; B/KB/MB/GB formatting); jsdom: name text is the accessible datum, glyph aria-hidden, empty name renders the category label never an empty title; browser legs: bordered card paints >= floor in a flex row, name cell truncates single-line (ADR-0106 mechanism), RTL glyph at inline-start, WHCM border+glyph visible

nodes.label: ui-toast + ui-toast-region folder (controls/toast/: toast.ts/.css/.md + toast-region.ts/.css/.md + tests — the radio/radio-group same-folder precedent)
nodes.accept: file-set gate passes for controls/toast/; jsdom (fake timers): auto-dismiss at duration, remaining-time pause/resume on hover AND focus-within, an actionable toast (action != '') NEVER auto-dismisses, close affordance emits close, action emits select then close; a11y probes read internals directly: role=status default, role=alert under urgent, set before insertion; browser legs (both engines, real short durations): show() never moves focus (document.activeElement unchanged), region rides popover=manual top layer, a toast shown WHILE a modal dialog is open paints above it (elementsFromPoint), region hides when its last toast closes

nodes.label: serial integration slice (controls/index.ts barrel · component-styles.css imports · site-coverage tier-membership edits · package.json exports · size report · geometry.md --ui-ind taxonomy-line repair)
nodes.accept: `npm run check && npm test` green repo-wide (family-coherence C1/C3 prove barrel exports + styles imports for all five new file sets; site-coverage tier membership lists updated — reverting the edit fails npm test, the negative control); per-control package.json exports entries added (ADR-0080 T4 gate); `npm run size` run by hand and reported with the family-budget re-base recorded as its own note if exceeded (ADR-0112 cl.8 expects it); references/geometry.md content-icon taxonomy line no longer cites the never-shipped --ui-ind (the ADR-0112 Repairs flag)

nodes.label: site pages (progress-doc, avatar-doc, attachment-doc, toast-region-doc + toast-doc & toast-demo per PAGES_BY_TIER) + nav/toc rows
nodes.accept: site-coverage per-tier page gate green for all five descriptors (display/indicator/layout -> {doc}; pattern -> {doc,demo}); site toc/nav drift gates green; the toast demo page exercises a live region + show() (the app-surface consumption story the catalog deliberately does not carry); `npm run check` (incl. check:site) green; pages render the live controls in the built site

nodes.label: attachment href leg (shared controls/_base/href-gate.ts consumed, name renders as a gated <a>) — lands with-or-after the shared gate module exists
nodes.accept: the ADR-0114 cl.2 gate is imported from the ONE shared module (created by whichever of the content/feed waves lands first — never a second policy copy; grep proves a single URL-parse allowlist site); allowed href -> the name is a real <a rel='noopener noreferrer' target='_blank'>; disallowed scheme (javascript:/data:/unparseable) or empty -> no href attribute, text intact, not announced as a link; browser negative control: a javascript: href never yields a navigable link in either engine

nodes.label: M1 catalog wave (same wave as the descriptors — ADR-0087)
default-catalog rows + factories + allowlist + feed partition (catalog.json Progress/Avatar/Attachment · factories.ts · EXCLUSION_ALLOWLIST Toast+ToastRegion · feed-catalog.ts partition rows)
nodes.accept: catalog.json declares Progress/Avatar/Attachment per the feed-family SPEC row contract, all display-only (no value mark), factory-bound; catalog/default/index.test.ts fleet-derived gate green with EXCLUSION_ALLOWLIST holding exactly the two reasoned entries (Toast, ToastRegion — cl.6 reason strings) and allowlistResidue proving neither is catalogued; feed-catalog.ts partition moves to 24 IN / 15 OUT over the 39-type catalog (Avatar IN; Progress OUT + reason; Attachment OUT + reason + named revisit trigger) with the partition gate green; a payload using all three types validates 0 CATALOG errors through validateA2ui

nodes.label: catalog SPEC repair (a2ui-catalog.spec.md §5.2 gains the three rows, same change as the rows land)
nodes.accept: a2ui-catalog.spec.md §5.2 carries Progress/Avatar/Attachment rows citing the landed factory facts; the harness spec check on the catalog SPEC still exits 0

nodes.label: agent-activity exemplar seed + document-row-toolbar attachment upgrade + §5.2 Notes guidance (incl. the TaskState pairing guidance — guidance, never an a2a import)
nodes.accept: the task-status exemplar (Avatar + Progress + Attachment in a Card) exists in the examples module and allSeeds, validates 0 CATALOG errors, renders in the gallery (browser-verified); the document-row-toolbar seed's hand-composed Icon+Text attachment card is REPLACED by the Attachment type; §5.2 Notes carry the Avatar/Progress/Attachment when-to-use guidance + the TaskState mapping (submitted/working -> indeterminate; fraction -> determinate; input-required -> an ask; terminals -> no bar) with zero imports from @agent-ui/a2a (layering trip-wire green)

nodes.label: corpus + derived-prompt re-validation over the widened 39-type catalog
nodes.accept: the corpus admission gate and the derived-prompt/coverage gates re-run green with the three new types (the ADR-0087 consequence pattern); any shard/prompt drift repaired in the same change

actions.label: show how far along agent work is — determinate and indeterminate, every degenerate value handled deterministically
announce progress to AT in every state (progressbar semantics, never silent, never aria-hidden)
paint the thin progress rail correctly everywhere: whole-shape floor, forced-colors, reduced-motion
render identity src -> initials -> glyph with no broken-image or silent-empty state
keep the avatar decorative by default (label escape hatch) and free of hue-only identity
render a FilePart-shaped file card: mime-derived glyph, formatted embedder-supplied size, name fallback + truncation
make the attachment name a safe link under ADR-0114's ratified gate, shared by reference — never a second policy
announce completions without interrupting: role=status/alert, focus never moves
keep toast timing humane: pause under hover and focus-within, never expire an offered action (WCAG 2.2.1)
stack toasts above every page stacking context, including a modal opened before the toast arrives
give page code a sanctioned imperative seam — a declarative region + instance show(), no global singleton (ADR-0082)
vendor the person + file-category glyphs BEFORE any consumer renders them (the document-row silent-empty defect is the counter-example)
join the fleet lifecycle: barrels, style imports, descriptor trip-wires, exports, size budget, the owed geometry.md repair
document the five components under the site per-tier page law, incl. the toast pair's app-surface consumption story
make the three display types catalog-reachable same-wave AND record the toast pair as the allowlist's first reasoned residents
keep the ADR-0097 feed partition total over the widened catalog (Avatar IN; Progress/Attachment OUT with reasons)
keep the owning catalog SPEC true — §5.2 rows land in the same change as the rows
teach models the activity idiom: exemplar seed, retire the hand-composed card, §5.2 guidance incl. the TaskState mapping without coupling
re-validate the teaching surfaces (corpus, derived prompt) over the widened catalog

edges.why: the avatar's terminal glyph fallback renders <ui-icon name='user'> — the name must exist in ICON_NAMES + the pack payload or the fallback chain ends in the silent-empty defect the family exists to retire
the attachment glyph resolves fileCategory -> a file-* icon name through the adapter — all eight category names must be registered before the card can render any glyph
the serial integration slice edits shared barrel/styles/gate files to export what the progress folder ships — the folder lands first (one-writer-per-file fan-out law)
same shared-file dependency for the avatar folder
same shared-file dependency for the attachment folder
same shared-file dependency for the toast folder (two file sets, one folder, one writer)

the href leg extends the shipped attachment element (its name cell becomes the gated anchor) — the metadata surface must exist before the link leg wires into it; ADR-0112 cl.4's ordering constraint is CLEARED (ADR-0114 accepted), so only this intra-family edge remains
the doc pages mount the barrel-exported, style-imported controls; before the integration slice the site build cannot resolve them

the fleet-derived catalog gate walks shipped descriptors (tag -> PascalCase) — rows, allowlist entries, and partition dispositions are validated against integrated descriptors in the same wave (ADR-0087/ADR-0097)
the §5.2 rows cite landed facts (factory binding, no value mark, prop cells) — the doc repair records shipped rows, not intentions
the exemplar and the document-row upgrade must validate 0-CATALOG against the widened catalog — the three rows must be declared before either seed can pass admission
the corpus/prompt re-validation covers the new exemplar and the upgraded seed — it runs after both join allSeeds so one pass proves the whole widened surface
